title: stelis celesticola
intro: Stelis celesticola, also known as the Celestial Stelis or Ant Orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and swelling. The health benefits of Stelis celesticola include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to create a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
